title: Attitudes towards Corporal Punishment of Children in Finland, Autumn 2008: Trend
description: The dataset continues the Central Union for Child Welfare study that investigates the use of corporal punishment in upbringing and attitudes towards it in Finland. Face-to-face interviews were carried out in September 2008 as part of an Omnibus study monthly conducted by Taloustutkimus. The data comprise one statement: "Using corporal punishment to discipline children is acceptable, at least in exceptional circumstances", and the respondents were asked to what extent they agreed or disagreed wit
